title: bupleurum falcatum f. irregulare
intro: Bupleurum falcatum f. irregulare, also known as irregular cutleaf hare's ear, is a variety of the Bupleurum falcatum plant, a flowering plant native to East Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant properties, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving liver function, and boosting the immune system. Bupleurum falcatum f. irregulare is commonly prepared as a decoction, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
